Your claim strengthens the decentralization of the Sophon network while you benefit from attractive yields.

Earn exclusive Claim badges

Gold Badge

Stake > 75% of your claimed SOPH, with a minimum amount of 250.000 SOPH.

Silver Badge

Stake > 75% of your claimed SOPH

Bronze Badge

Stake > 50% of your claimed SOPH

You must maintain your stake for at least 3 months after claiming period ends.

Qualify for Bronze, Silver or Gold SOPH Staker status and the exclusive benefits that come with each tier. Read the full rules here.
